original_image_tags: A hand-drawn map or sketch on a dark background, possibly a negative or white-on-dark drawing. The map depicts an intersection of roads, a creek, and wooded areas. A north arrow points upward. The word "CONFIDENTIAL" is stamped at the top right and bottom left.

elements.description: A hand-drawn map on a dark background with white lines and text. It shows a geographic layout with roads, woods, a creek, and a bridge. Labels include 'CONFIDENTIAL' at the top and bottom, a north arrow, 'E 56th St', 'Fall Creek Blvd', 'Path of Object', 'Woods' (multiple instances), 'Cantilever Type Bridge', 'Clearing', 'Fall Creek', 'Lady wood School (Approx 1/4 mi f/sighting)', and a signature block '/s/ Russell J. Carey Jr., 1st Lt, USAF Intel Officer'.

judge.reason: Both sides agree the visual content is a hand-drawn sketch map on a dark background with roads, woods, a creek, a bridge, a north arrow, and 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps; Description B adds extensive label details and a signature block that Description A omits but they do not contradict each other on any shared quoted text.
